entity.summary: Global centralized cryptocurrency exchange founded by Haipo Yang on December 24, 2017, with documented 2023 New York regulatory and hot-wallet security events.
entity.notes: CoinEx's official history gives an exact founding date of December 24, 2017. The exchange remains active; the 2023 New York settlement was jurisdiction-specific, and the September 2023 hot-wallet attack was followed by wallet reconstruction and service resumption.

events.title: CoinEx was founded
events.description: Haipo Yang founded CoinEx on December 24, 2017 as a centralized cryptocurrency exchange.
events.notes: The exact founding date is stated by CoinEx's official history.

events.title: CoinEx agreed to New York ban and monetary settlement
events.description: CoinEx agreed to pay about $1.8 million and be banned from operating in New York to resolve a lawsuit brought by the New York Attorney General alleging illegal unregistered operations in the state.
events.notes: This was a jurisdiction-specific regulatory action and did not mark CoinEx as dead globally.

events.title: CoinEx hot-wallet private key was compromised
events.description: CoinEx detected anomalous withdrawals from hot wallets on September 12, 2023 and later stated that the incident was caused by leakage of a hot-wallet private key.
events.notes: CoinEx suspended deposits and withdrawals during wallet reconstruction and began restoring services on September 21, 2023.

evidence.title: CoinEx accepts New York ban, to pay $1.8 million to resolve attorney general lawsuit
evidence.notes: Reuters report on the New York settlement and ban.

evidence.title: Attorney General James Secures $1.7 Million from Cryptocurrency Platform CoinEx
Blockchain analysts suspect N. Korea-linked hackers behind $70 mln crypto theft
evidence.notes: Independent reporting on the CoinEx September 2023 hot-wallet attack and estimated loss.

evidence.title: Latest Progress of the Hacking Attack on Sep 12, 2023
evidence.notes: Official incident update states that anomalous hot-wallet withdrawals were detected on September 12 and preliminarily attributes the attack to leakage of a hot-wallet private key.

evidence.title: CoinEx official website
evidence.notes: Official domain verifies the current CoinEx identity and active exchange service.

evidence.title: CoinEx: Four Years of Solid Progress, CoinEx is All Set for a New Adventure
evidence.notes: Official history states that Haipo Yang founded CoinEx on December 24, 2017.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for CoinEx
evidence.notes: Specific independent exchange profile corroborates the CoinEx identity and current market activity.
